name: 🍋Jax Humont
description:
!MLA!

“Cause we’re the bitterest boys in town…”

Inspired by Lemon Boy by Cavetown. Damn I love this song.

Hello everyone!! God there’s so much I need to say. First of all, than you so much for 600+ followers 😭😭 I cannot believe my account is growing so quickly holy shit. Thanks to all my ogs for all of your support and kind words and thank you to all the new followers for choosing to click that button and giving me a serotonin boost 🙏🙏. I really wanna apologize for being gone for so long like damn. Most of the stuff that’s been keeping me busy has been pretty much over with so I have had some time to post, but burnout hit me like a semi truck 💀. I’ve had trouble forcing myself to write but I’m hoping it’s going away. I really want to say thank you all for being so patient with me, it means a lot. I’m really trying to get back onto the grind I swear. Something else I wanted to say is thank you all so much for the requests, you’re really helping me out. Like actually. I plan on doing em all asap, i just wanted to finally get out bots that have been in the works😈. Someone wrote Mitski’s Class of 2013 lyrics in my form which I thought was silly 😭. Also, totally forgot to mention this but in a week or two I’ll be going out of the country. Im not sure how this will impact my posting schedule but it could go either way. In one hand, most of my distractions at home will be gone, but again I’ll be traveling. Hoping for the best!! As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Mentions of emotional and physical abuse in background. Mentions of murder in background.⚠️

ART IS **NOT** MINE- I couldn't find the artist, but if you know who it is please let me know :)) !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
